subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the presence of Bahá unto him who hath believed in God and remained steadfast in the straight path. We beseech God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی البهاء الی الذی آمن بالله و کان علی الصراط مستقیما و نسئل الله بان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
